task_description: Implement Product Design Bible chapters 2.1.1 through 2.3.5: Homepage editorial redesign with hero section and content sections (2.1.x), universal search experience with AI discovery (2.2.x), and artist experience with cinematic hero and enhanced discography (2.3.x).

verification.summary: bun run lint passes with zero errors. bun run build compiles successfully with all 14 routes rendering. Review fixes applied: AIDiscoveryPanel routes through /api/recommendations, ArtistHero uses ref-based parallax, ArtistNav consolidated to single scroll listener, PersonalizedSection shows error feedback, ArtistVideos shows error state, AbortController added to AIDiscoveryPanel.
